description: Make a table of cumulative number of extracted markers (0-100%) versus fragment diameter. The x-axis is usually plotted on a log scale.

keywords.name: divisions
keywords.description: If this input is omitted, 50 divisions are used.

keywords.name: drawpoints
keywords.description: If this input is omitted, all drawpoints will be considered.

keywords.name: minimum
keywords.description: If this input is omitted, the minimum fragment diameter is used.

keywords.name: maximum
keywords.description: If this input is omitted, the maximum fragment diameter is used.

keywords.name: period-start
keywords.description: Specify the starting period for extracted markers. Markers extracted before the input period are not considered. The default value is 1.

keywords.name: period-end
keywords.description: Specify the ending period for extracted markers. Markers extracted after the input period are not considered. The default value is the number of periods that have been calculated.

keywords.name: table
keywords.description: Specify the name of the table. If no name is given, the table name defaults to size-distribution .
